name: docks
description: Multi-agent pipeline kit (skills only on Codex — full version with Builder-Verifier slash commands and tiered Opus/Sonnet subagents on Claude Code). Portable engineering-convention skills cover test-first / coverage / fix workflows, code review, SOLID, type-safety discipline, React component patterns (effects + composition), dep-vuln triage, design tokens, plans bootstrapping, and multi-tool AGENTS.md bridging.
